channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overhanging branch, extending toward powerlines, 3rd April
item.description:
Fern house
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Butt's Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double lightpost out, 3rd April
item.description:
Outside of Monsoon, double lightpost permanently out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 170, High Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover is noisy and rattles when any vehicle drives over it, 3rd April
item.description:
Outside 88
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potential missing "except cyclists" signs after posts replaced, 3rd April
item.description:
Signs attached to post at junction of Winchcombe Street and Albion Street. There was previously "no left turns except cyclists" signs but now the signs are missing so require a longer round route onto the ringroad.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37-39, Winchcombe Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is missing (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: 6 inch maybe deeper, 3rd April
item.description:
Right across the Brooklyn club Using the what three word is gave me studio.single.fence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Brooklyn Road, St Mark's, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - bed frame and other furniture, 3rd April
item.description:
Flipped waste yet again ///edgy.exonerate.bandaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickfield Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Failed repair again by drain, 3rd April
item.description:
The repair by the drain near the speed bump has failed leaving a sharp edge around the drain. It was only repaired a few weeks ago but very badly. This needs to have more tarmac added around the entire potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, Arle Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30mph signs, 2nd April
item.description:
Opposite Webbs Garden Centre

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: The bus stop opposite Southern Road was removed several weeks ago. This makes it very difficult for bus drivers who are unfamiliar with the route and often they will overshoot or even fail to stop. Please could this be re-instated as soon as possible. ., 2nd April
item.description:
The Southern Road bus stop in the Old Bath Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Bath Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 foot long pot hole /crater with lots of loose gravel in it. It located in lane which May walkers use and it’s a hazard., 2nd April
item.description:
It’s located on side of lane nearest to properties and between Rockwall property and junction to Wayward Lad Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street drain blocked with mud, 2nd April
item.description:
The street drain is blocked with jus, water doesn’t drain properly. Has flooded in past and also endangering watershed of nearby basement flat making flooding more likely as water not draining away from area. what three words location ///shield.often.senses

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 418, Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bridge on climbing frame, 2nd April
item.description:
One of the fixing bolts for the bridge on the climbing frame has completely come away (Kompan equipment)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charlie's Way, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge tree on highway verge over hanging property, 2nd April
item.description:
3 Wellington Road Cheltenham and other neighbouring properties.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Union Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass bottle on footpath., 2nd April
item.description:
Footpath parallel to Up Hatherley Way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Up Hatherley Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint covered in grey paint, 2nd April
item.description:
The sign just before GE Roundabout heading from Cleeve on Cheltenham road after the removal of the temp 30mph due to cycle path work, the sign is still covered in grey paint so can't see the speed limit what the sign is displaying (guessing it says 40)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 2nd April
item.description:
15DB CW: Edge deteration 1000mmx350mmx48mm TM: temporary road closure Outside No 2 (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 2nd April
item.description:
FW: Abrupt Level Difference (Patch Required) 2300mmx1000mmx21mm TM: Give and Take Stats required Outside No 2 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd April
item.description:
15DB CW: Pothole 300mmx280mmx49mm TM: temporary road closure 8 x NSDs Outside No 2 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Four months !!, 2nd April
item.description:
This pothole was reported in January. February, March and now April. What does it take to get it noticed by highways . No white paint EVER had been put down, please send your crew out with some decent tarmac and fix it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp permanently out, 2nd April
item.description:
Column 12 Albion Street, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Street, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
